content:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary goal of data analytics in IoT?",
      "options": ["A) To enhance the user experience", "B) To improve the efficiency of devices", "C) To extract insights from large amounts of data", "D) To reduce energy consumption"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Data analytics in IoT aims to extract insights from large amounts of data generated by connected devices, which can be used to improve decision-making and optimize processes.
